item.title: 58K‑Mile 1977 Charger Daytona
item.description: A rare survivor with only 58,000 miles, this 1977 Charger Daytona shows off its muscle heritage and unique styling.

media:content.media:title: 58K‑Mile 1977 Charger Daytona
media:content.media:description: A rare survivor with only 58,000 miles, this 1977 Charger Daytona shows off its muscle heritage and unique styling.

item.title: The Lightest GT40 Ever Built!
item.description: The Ford GT40 was built to dominate — and this one takes it even further. Known as the lightest GT40 ever, it’s a rare piece of racing history engineered for ultimate performance.

media:content.media:title: The Lightest GT40 Ever Built!
media:content.media:description: The Ford GT40 was built to dominate — and this one takes it even further. Known as the lightest GT40 ever, it’s a rare piece of racing history engineered for ultimate performance.

item.title: This ’65 Volkswagen Is Fantastic Both Inside & Out
item.description: From its charming exterior to its surprisingly refined interior, this 1965 Volkswagen proves that simplicity never goes out of style. A true classic that shines from every angle.

media:content.media:title: This ’65 Volkswagen Is Fantastic Both Inside & Out
media:content.media:description: From its charming exterior to its surprisingly refined interior, this 1965 Volkswagen proves that simplicity never goes out of style. A true classic that shines from every angle.

item.title: 1956 Imperial Southampton 2‑Door 354 Hemi V8 in Blue
item.description: Luxury meets muscle in this rare 1956 Imperial Southampton. With its 354 Hemi V8 and striking blue finish, this two‑door coupe is a stunning blend of elegance and brute force.

media:content.media:title: 1956 Imperial Southampton 2‑Door 354 Hemi V8 in Blue
media:content.media:description: Luxury meets muscle in this rare 1956 Imperial Southampton. With its 354 Hemi V8 and striking blue finish, this two‑door coupe is a stunning blend of elegance and brute force.

item.title: 1965 Shelby AC Cobra
item.description: The ’65 Shelby AC Cobra is a legend of speed and style — raw power wrapped in timeless curves. This clip takes you up close with one of the most iconic muscle machines ever built.

media:content.media:title: 1965 Shelby AC Cobra
media:content.media:description: The ’65 Shelby AC Cobra is a legend of speed and style — raw power wrapped in timeless curves. This clip takes you up close with one of the most iconic muscle machines ever built.

item.title: Taking a Ride in a California Car | Mustang ’66
item.description: This sun‑soaked ’66 Mustang still carries the spirit of classic California cruising. What makes this vintage ride feel so smooth and timeless on the open road?

media:content.media:title: Taking a Ride in a California Car | Mustang ’66
media:content.media:description: This sun‑soaked ’66 Mustang still carries the spirit of classic California cruising. What makes this vintage ride feel so smooth and timeless on the open road?

item.title: Rare 1964 Pontiac Bonneville!

item.title: 1966 Oldsmobile 442: A Rare Classic Ride
item.description: A true muscle‑era standout, the ’66 442 blends power and style in a way few cars of its time could match. What rare details set this one apart?

item.title: The Unexpected Luxury of the ’70 Fury Sport G

item.title: This 1960 Eldorado Convertible Is Incredibly Rare
item.description: A true Cadillac icon, the 1960 Eldorado Convertible stands as one of the rarest luxury cruisers of its era. What hidden details make this survivor even more special than it looks?

item.title: 1969 Mercury Marauder X‑100
item.description: A heavyweight bruiser with unmistakable late‑’60s swagger, the Marauder X‑100 blended luxury with raw muscle. What hidden power and unique features make this ’69 model such an underrated classic?
